content: Backend: add make_thumbnail() util — data-URL in, small JPEG data-URL out
Backend: /closet list endpoint generates + caches thumbnail_data_url, strips heavy *_image_url fields from response
Frontend: Closet.jsx prefers thumbnail_data_url for card render (fallback to existing fields)
Frontend: module-level closet cache so navigation doesn't re-trigger 25MB fetch (stale-while-revalidate)
Backend: when user opens /closet/:id detail, still return full *_image_url fields
Lint + restart + verify dev preview still works
